label: Formal methods, specifications & proof obligations

node.label: Formal methods, specifications & proof obligations
node.definition: Formal methods express desired behavior as mathematical specifications and use proof, model checking, abstract interpretation, or certificates to establish correctness claims.
node.why_it_matters: They distinguish behavior that has merely been sampled in tests from behavior proven under explicit assumptions.
limitations: A guarantee is only as sound as its specification, abstraction, solver, and environmental assumptions.

dependencies.rationale: Formal methods, specifications & proof obligations rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Discrete mathematics & logic.
Formal methods, specifications & proof obligations rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Programming languages, compilers & type systems.
Formal methods, specifications & proof obligations rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Algorithms & data structures.

sentence_units.text: Formal methods express desired behavior as mathematical specifications and use proof, model checking, abstract interpretation, or certificates to establish correctness claims.

A guarantee is only as sound as its specification, abstraction, solver, and environmental assumptions.
